apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of limits to evaluate the limits of various functions.
Students will be able to apply the concept of derivatives to find the derivative of various functions.
Students will be able to apply the rules of differentiation to find the derivative of composite functions.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the behavior of functions using the concept of limits and derivatives.
Students will be able to analyze the rate of change of functions using the concept of derivatives.
Students will be able to analyze the optimization problems using the concept of derivatives.
remember: Students will be able to recall the basic definitions of limits of a function and their types.
Students will be able to recall the basic concepts of derivatives, including the definition of a derivative.
Students will be able to recall the basic rules of differentiation, including the power rule, product rule, and quotient rule.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of a limit and its application to various types of functions.
Students will be able to understand the concept of a derivative and its geometric interpretation.
Students will be able to understand the significance of derivatives in the context of optimization problems.

ncert_objectives: To define the limit of a function and to establish various rules for finding the limits of different types of functions.
To introduce the concept of a derivative as a limit of difference quotient and to establish various rules for finding the derivatives of different types of functions.
To use the concept of derivatives to solve problems of maxima and minima,
board_exam_objectives: To evaluate the limits of various types of functions, including trigonometric functions and exponential functions.
To find the derivative of various types of functions, including polynomial functions, trigonometric functions, and exponential functions.
To use the concept of derivatives to solve problems of maxima and minima, including optimization problems.
